title: nengella pterophylla
intro: Nengella pterophylla is a plant species found in Australia, specifically in the tropical regions of Northern Territory and Western Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of flowering plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Nengella pterophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight against infections, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Nengella pterophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
